case_title: AUDREY BEKHOR VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEKHOR, AUDREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $837.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $877.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
